channel.title: NAI Méndez Maestro, L Peña Merino, B Udondo González Del Tánago, A Aramburu González, A Orbea Sopeña, J Sánchez De Vicente, JA Ratón Nieto, E Acebo Mariñas, J Gardeazabal García | PlatCOVID

item.title: Skin manifestations in patients hospitalized with confirmed COVID-19 disease: a cross-sectional study in a tertiary hospital.
